rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE DEL PRADO FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/04/2023 to be heard with the related petition filed by Rene Del Prado. The following issues must be addressed: 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. 2) No financial account statement verifying the ending cash balanace is on file. A declaration re retention of the original statement required by LRSF 14.59(A) must also be filed. 3) Exhibit T appears to be an "estimated" closing escrow statement showing amounts slightly different from some receipts and disbursements. Please provide a copy of a final closing escrow statement. 4) Schedule C: The original payees must be disclosed as to the $15,369.17 reimbursement to Kathryn Guillen. LRSF 14.34(B). 5) Schedules 1 & D: Is the property address 494 46th Ave?

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF JAMES P. RHEMER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/04/2023 to be reviewed with the related trust accounting petition filed in PTR-19-303367. A preliminary review indicates that the following issues must be addressed: 1) Paragraph 5 of the petition: The next succeeding account (third account) cannot be waived, as the requirement of Probate Code section 2628(a)(1) is not satisfied. The net value of assets at the beginning of the third account period must be less than $15,000. Once the assets are exhausted during the third account period, the third account must be filed as a final account under section 2626 for the Court to consider whether to terminate the conservatorship of the estate. 2) Paragraph 8: If the sale occurred after this second account period, it must be reported, and ratification must be sought, by the third account. See section 2625. 3) Paragraph 9: The petitioner has not filed a new proposed hourly fee schedule or another statement of her proposed compensation required by section 2614.8. 4) Paragraph 11: As the third account cannot be waived, the petitioner's bond cannot be waived under section 2323(a). The bond calculation must be provided if reduction is sought. 5) Schedule C: i) Please describe circumstances that required additional care fees after February 2022. ii) For each disbursement listed as "reimbursement", the original payee must be disclosed. LRSF 14.34(B).
